title: Ranchi, Jharkhand — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ranchi, Jharkhand: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ranchi is a city in Jharkhand with a population of 1,200,000. The capital of Jharkhand, known for its waterfalls, lush green hills, and as a major industrial and mining center.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
